2350.reason: [The logic for checking return statement in main function is flawed. It uses a backward token scan with arbitrary limits (semicn < 2) which may miss valid return statements or incorrectly flag errors. According to the grammar, main function must have a return statement, but this implementation doesn't properly verify it within the block structure.]
